name: Grayson Hart ✿ ACADEMIC RIVAL
description:
𝖬𝟦𝖬 ┊ 𝖺𝖼𝖺𝖽𝖾𝗆𝗂𝖼 𝗋𝗂𝗏𝖺𝗅𝗌 𝗍𝗈 𝗅𝗈𝗏𝖾𝗋𝗌 ┊ 𝖬𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Grayson and you aren't the best of friends. You and Grayson go to a prestigious school called Oakridge Academy. You guys are academic rivals. Problem is, he doesn't study, is stupidly popular and gets better grades than you. Publicly, you deemed him as your academic rival, which he happily accepts. Now, you two are competing with your grades all the time. In a way, it's fun for the both of you, but neither want to admit it.〛

For the cherry on top, you two also have a dorm together, somehow, fueling your hatred towards each other more.

(Made an alt scenario, for 1st year anniversary of this bot!)
Grayson Hart // ACADEMIC RIVALS (2)
please go check this one out!!

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

Hello everyone! Well… this is the second time I’m editing this bot due to new text markdowns and such. Anyway, this bot was definitely inspired by the song “Unfriendly Hater” by Meddmia. You can see with my public characters, many of my bots are inspired by the BSD ship “soukoku” and the song “Unfriendly Hater”. Despite the fact this is one of my oldest bots, it is definitely still my favorite. Thank you for still using it after all this time!
